testcase.name: contextLoads

error.message: Failed to load ApplicationContext for [WebMergedContextConfiguration@253c1256 testClass = com.example.supportdesk.SupportdeskApplicationTests, locations = [], classes = [com.example.supportdesk.SupportdeskApplication], contextInitializerClasses = [], activeProfiles = [], propertySourceDescriptors = [], propertySourceProperties = ["org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper=true"], contextCustomizers = [org.springframework.boot.test.context.filter.ExcludeFilterContextCustomizer@5dafbe45, org.springframework.boot.test.json.DuplicateJsonObjectContextCustomizerFactory$DuplicateJsonObjectContextCustomizer@d2de489, org.springframework.boot.test.mock.mockito.MockitoContextCustomizer@0, org.springframework.boot.test.web.client.TestRestTemplateContextCustomizer@f58853c, org.springframework.boot.test.web.reactor.netty.DisableReactorResourceFactoryGlobalResourcesContextCustomizerFactory$DisableReactorResourceFactoryGlobalResourcesContextCustomizerCustomizer@147e2ae7, org.springframework.boot.test.autoconfigure.OnFailureConditionReportContextCustomizerFactory$OnFailureConditionReportContextCustomizer@15d49048, org.springframework.boot.test.autoconfigure.actuate.observability.ObservabilityContextCustomizerFactory$DisableObservabilityContextCustomizer@1f, org.springframework.boot.test.autoconfigure.properties.PropertyMappingContextCustomizer@0, org.springframework.boot.test.autoconfigure.web.servlet.WebDriverContextCustomizer@5f9edf14, org.springframework.test.context.support.DynamicPropertiesContextCustomizer@0, org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestAnnotation@789d2357], resourceBasePath = "src/main/webapp", contextLoader = org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootContextLoader, parent = null]

22:03:20.961 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.example.supportdesk.SupportdeskApplicationTests]: SupportdeskApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 22:03:21.196 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.example.supportdesk.SupportdeskApplication for test class com.example.supportdesk.SupportdeskApplicationTests 22:03:21.559 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.devtools.restart.RestartApplicationListener -- Restart disabled due to context in which it is running 2025-05-30T22:03:22.752+05:30 ERROR 19440 --- [${SPRING_APPLICATION_NAME}] [ main] o.s.b.d.LoggingFailureAnalysisReporter :
*************************** APPLICATION FAILED TO START ***************************
Description:
Failed to bind properties under 'spring.main.allow-circular-references' to boolean:
Property: spring.main.allow-circular-references Value: "${SPRING_MAIN_ALLOW_CIRCULAR_REFERENCES}" Origin: class path resource [application.properties] - 7:39 Reason: failed to convert java.lang.String to boolean (caused by java.lang.IllegalArgumentException: Invalid boolean value '${SPRING_MAIN_ALLOW_CIRCULAR_REFERENCES}')
Action:
Update your application's configuration
